checklist_items: Mat covering started in all rooms, False ceiling material received and layout marked, Framework installation started with electrical layout confirmed, Electrical conduits fixed; cut-outs aligned, Ceiling boards fixed, wire pulling done, Ceiling putty and 1st coat of paint completed, Lights ordered and site cleared, Review of completion, site photos, and readiness for Week 2

Plywood/HDHMR delivery and drawing confirmation, Kitchen carcass marking and construction started, Bedroom wardrobes, lofts, beds, TV unit box structures installed, Alignment, joinery quality, and tool use verified, Supervisor checks and edge work completed, Site cleanup, hardware delivery for next phase, Photo documentation and confirmation for Week 3 readiness

Beds, TV unit, and temple shaping started, Panel cutting, carving, dressing shelf alignment in progress, Hardware check (hinges, screws, supports), Designer/client review for shaping output, Final sanding and smoothing for laminate prep, Upload unit photos and laminate readiness checklist

Laminate sheets and adhesive verified, Laminate pasting and pressing across all furniture, Edge banding, trimming, and visual QA (bubbles, misalignment), Temple/study/loft units laminated, Cleaning and transition setup for civil/tile work, Spot-check by design team and completion review

column5: Granite/tile delivery and quality check, Platform and backsplash fitting started, Wardrobe shutters, accessories, baskets installed, 50% milestone check; shower/mirror measurements, Reorders for breakages, tile grouting, glass scheduling, Final polish and setup for painting & electrical next sprint

column4: Paint touch-ups and wooden polish scheduled, Electrical fittings (fans, switches, internet, lights) done, Glass and mirrors installed, bathroom fittings reviewed, Final coat of paint and QA of electrical wiring, Cleanup initiated, photos uploaded, Ready for deep cleaning and décor Week 7

Touch-up walkthrough with designer, Loose ends fixed: locks, drawers, hardware, Cleaning started: floors, mirrors, fixtures, Curtain rods, bathroom accessories fitted, Snag list created, resolved; feedback collected, Décor team and wallpaper material delivery confirmed, 100% readiness for final setup

column5: Wallpaper and decorative items installed, Final cleaning, QA and PM walkthrough, Client walkthrough, fittings tested, Handover kit (warranty, manuals) given, Photos/videos taken, testimonial captured, Final report archived in CRM & project marked closed
